title: Instant Fire Starter Outdoor Survival Magnesium Compact Striking Stick
description:

Instant Fire Starter Outdoor Survival Magnesium Compact Striking Stick

The ASR Outdoor Emergency Match Lighter Fire Stick Starter Survival Tool Keychain with Compass is an essential survival tool and everyday carry item to keep in your skiing backpack, bug out bag, emergency preparedness kit, camping gear or survival bag. Compact and lightweight, this fire stick starter tool is reusable, easy to maneuver and a cinch to pack with you, no matter what outdoor activities you have planned! What makes this emergency fire stick starter tool a must-have in your arsenal of survival gear? Read on:

Key Features

  • FIRE STARTER SURVIVAL TOOL: Pack this match style fire stick starter tool with the rest of your camping, hiking or survival gear to easily start a fire anywhere anytime; and as a bonus, a built in compass will help to keep you on course if you’re lost in the wilderness
  • THOUSANDS OF LIGHTS: This amazing fire stick fire starter survival tool holds 2ml of lighter fluid (not included) and will ignite over 15,000 times, never leaving you without a fire or heat source
  • PORTABLE AND LIGHTWEIGHT: Attached to an included keychain, the emergency match lighter fire stick is easily transportable and lightweight; secure it alongside your keys or on a lanyard, on a backpack strap or loop, with a carabiner or toss it in your bug out bag or survival kit
  • EASY TO USE: Simply pull the fire stick starter out of the casing; the lighter survival tool will start a fire every time you strike the magnesium fire stick against the outer aluminum striking plate just like you would do using a regular match
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Weight: 0.5lbs; Dimensions: 2.5 x 0.75 inches; Magnesium Rod: 1.25 inches; Fuel: Lighter fluid; Fuel capacity: 2ml; NOTE: lighter fluid NOT included due to shipping restrictions

Product Specifications

  • MPN: IF213-800
  • UPC: 841862716322
  • Color: Black

- Lightweight and compact design - Easy to carry with included keychain - Reusable; will ignite over 15,000+ times! - Easy to use, just like striking a wood match - Striking plate included on exterior of tool - BONUS: built-in compass to keep you on course

In addition to starting fires for emergency or cooking scenarios, you can also use the instant lighter fire stick starter tool for starting barbecues, lighting a lantern or camping lantern, an oil lamp, a Bunsen burner, a blow torch, fire pits outdoor, fireplaces or candles. It is safe to use in a kitchen setting, as it will not smoke or set off smoke or fire alarms.

The ASR Outdoor Emergency Pocket Instant Lighter Fire Stick Starter Survival Tool is truly an essential survival tool you’ll want to add to your outdoor gear, survival gear, camping gear or hiking backpack, and you’ll always be ready for any emergency, natural disaster, power outage or off-grid survival situation.
